violations.text: At the time of inspection, upon review of the online menu, an allergen awareness statement was observed to be lacking. An allergen statement is to be provided for customer viewing on the menu. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025

Pickled Red Onion was observed held in refrigeration beyond 7 days from the date of preparation. PIC disposed of the Pickled Red Onion at the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/18/2025
